hooks.name: Backend Unit Tests on Save
hooks.description: Runs backend unit tests (pytest -m unit) whenever a Python file in backend/app/ is saved, providing instant feedback on regressions before commit.

action.prompt: Run backend unit tests: cd backend && ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -m unit -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -30. If any tests FAIL, clearly report which tests failed and why. If all pass, just say '✅ All unit tests pass' and nothing else.
